Do you want to play the Minecraft Movie in game? Try this modapck and step into the Minecraft Movie: Play the Minecraft movie with this immersive modpack, designed to bring the cursed experience to life! 

> **This modpack features:**

<details>
<summary>FAQ</summary>

**What is this modpack about?**

This modpack is designed to recreate the experience of Minecraft: The Movie

**What version of Minecraft does this modpack run on?**

The modpack is built for Minecraft 1.21.3+, but future updates may support newer versions as mods get updated.

**How do I install the modpack?**   

You can install it using the Modrinth launcher!

**Can I play this modpack with friends?**   

Yes! The modpack is multiplayer-compatible. You can set up a essentials world.

**Can I suggest features or mods to add?**

We welcome feedback and suggestions through our Discord server.


</details>
